segments.scene_description: A continuous first-person walk through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The path is narrow and enclosed by tall pine trees with thick undergrowth. As the camera moves forward, a wooden fence post appears on the left, followed by a large rock and fallen branches. Near the end of the clip, a wooden structure becomes visible in the distance on the left side as the path opens slightly.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic nocturnal forest that gradually opens toward a distant man-made structure. It begins with a walk along a narrow dirt path, where the flashlight beam cuts through the darkness to reveal towering pine trees and thick undergrowth pressing in from both sides. As the camera pushes forward, the terrain becomes cluttered with a wooden fence post, a large rock, and scattered fallen branches. The scene then shifts as the dense foliage begins to thin, allowing the path to widen slightly. Finally, the view expands to reveal the silhouette of a wooden structure emerging in the distance on the left.
